description.ko: ECHO-0는 복잡한 음향 진동을 몰입형 디지털 아트로 변환하여 소리와 시각 사이의 간극을 메우는 고급 인공지능 모듈입니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an advanced artificial intelligence module that translates complex acoustic vibrations into immersive digital art, bridging the gap between sound and sight.

prompt: Cinematic close-up of ECHO-0, a futuristic cybernetic core visualizing sound waves as vibrant neon pulses and fluid digital particles. Rhythmic geometric patterns reflecting audio frequencies, dark minimalist background, glowing cyan and magenta light, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic.
